source.sqlReaderQuery: select col1 from dbo.SingleCol order by ID
select distinct replace(substring(convert(varchar(30), date),1,10),'-','') as [datestring] from [dbo].[publicholidays]

query.value:
@concat(
item().query,
    '<filter type="and">
      <condition attribute="modifiedon" operator="lt" value="',
substring(replace(string(startOfHour(utcNow())),'T',' '),0,23),
'" />
      <condition attribute="modifiedon" operator="ge" value="',
substring(replace(string(string(startOfHour(addhours(utcNow(),-1)))),'T',' '),0,23),
'" />
    </filter>
  </entity>
</fetch>
'
)

scriptLines: {MAPPED CSA BY ISIN V2} as string,

properties.description: Data flow which reads CDM entity, transforms the data and move the data to destination SQL DB

scriptLines: timestampFormats: ['MM/dd/yyyy hh:mm:ss a','MM-dd-yyyy hh:mm:ss a','yyyy.MM.dd hh:mm:ss a','yyyy-MM-dd\'T\'HH:mm:ss\'Z\'','yyyy-MM-dd\'T\'HH:mm:ss.SSS\'Z\'','yyyy-MM-dd\'T\'HH:mm:ss']) ~> currentfolder
query: ("SELECT premaxversion AS maxversion FROM " + $dbschema + "." + $prefix + "DataverseToSQLVerionLog WHERE Entity = '" + $entity + "'"),

query: 'SELECT COALESCE(MAX(versionnumber),0) AS maxversion , COALESCE(MAX(SinkModifiedOn),0) AS maxmodified FROM [dbo].[custgroup]',

query: 'select
EntityName,
OptionSetName,
convert(varchar(2),[Option]) as [Option],
CASE WHEN IsUserLocalizedLabel = 1 THEN 'True' ELSE 'False' END AS IsUserLocalizedLabel,
convert(varchar(5),LocalizedLabelLanguageCode) as LocalizedLabelLanguageCode,
LocalizedLabel
from optionsetmetadata ',
